reviews.comment:
Es un clásico ACA de ruta.
Baños limpios y buen parque para descansar.
Se puede parar con confianza.

(Translated by Google)
It's a classic ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) roadside rest stop.
Clean restrooms and a good-sized park for resting. You can stop with confidence.

reviews.comment:
Aceptable para tomar algo ,Baños limpios y mucho más tranquilo que las otras estaciones más grandes .Aunque no hay tantas opciones para tomar algo o comer .

(Translated by Google)
Acceptable for a drink, clean bathrooms and much quieter than the other larger stations. Although there aren't as many options for drinks or food.
